title: How Atlanta Plans to Rebuild Its Downtown

summary: Downtown Atlanta once stood at the center of the city’s cultural and economic life. After decades of decline, a $5 billion redevelopment project called Centennial Yards aims to transform a stretch of underused land known as "the gulch" into a new 50-acre hub for housing, entertainment and business. With the 2026 FIFA World Cup approaching and billions of dollars on the line, can this ambitious bet bring life back to the heart of Atlanta?  (Source: Bloomberg)

title_cn: 人为关注估值超过 9000 亿美元 |彭博科技 2026 年 5 月 13 日

Plus, Anthropic is looking to raise at least $30 billion in fresh financing at a valuation of more than $900 billion, in what could be its largest funding round yet. And, we speak with Anduril CEO Brian Schimpf as the company hits a $61 billion valuation in its latest funding round.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title_cn: Anthropic 正在洽谈融资 300 亿美元，估值达 9000 亿美元
summary: Anthropic PBC is in early talks with investors to raise at least $30 billion in fresh financing, according to people familiar with the matter, setting the stage for what could be its largest funding round yet. The Claude maker would then be valued at more than $900 billion. Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI In Focus As Top CEOs Head To China For Trade Summit
title_cn: 顶级首席执行官前往中国参加贸易峰会，人工智能成为焦点
summary: US business leaders including Apple Inc.’s Tim Cook and Tesla Inc.’s Elon Musk on Trump’s first overseas trip since waging war in the Middle East — a 36-hour visit with Xi Jinping that’s expected to encompass the war, tariffs and the self-ruled island of Taiwan. The list of attendees until Tuesday had not included Huang, whose company makes the chips at the heart of the AI boom and has been pushing for greater leeway in a market he’s identified as a $50 billion opportunity. Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Varda Deepens Drugs-in-Space Bet After Win With AIDS Medication
title_cn: 瓦尔达在艾滋病药物获胜后加深了太空药物赌注
summary: Varda Space Industries Inc. is expanding plans for orbital pharmaceutical manufacturing beyond its recent success in crystallizing HIV drug Ritonavir in space, Chief Executive Officer Will Bruey said.

title: Silicon Valley Prosecutor Targets Foreign Corporate Spying
title_cn: 硅谷检察官针对外国企业间谍活动
summary: Silicon Valley’s top federal prosecutor said his top priorities include cases of trade-secret theft and economic espionage involving foreign adversaries such as China.

title: Affirm Seeing Real, Scalable Growth, CEO Says
title_cn: 首席执行官表示，确认看到了真正的、可扩展的增长
summary: Agentic commerce and international expansion is the new focus for Affirm, which laid out a bold roadmap to $100 billion in annual volume at the company's 2026 Investor Forum. Affirm CEO Max Levchin joins Ed Ludlow and Caroline Hyde to break it down on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Varda CEO Sees More Wins for Drugmaking in Earth Orbit
title_cn: 瓦尔达首席执行官看到地球轨道制药业取得更多胜利
summary: Varda Space is planning to send medicines from United Therapeutics into orbit to explore the use of microgravity in creating drugs. This is one of the first commercial research deals to develop medicine molecules in space and return them to Earth, though the missions are still in the early stages. Varda CEO Will Bruey joins Ed Ludlow and Caroline Hyde on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Lands in China as War-Fueled Inflation Surges | Open Interest 5/13/2026
title_cn: 战争引发的通胀飙升，特朗普登陆中国未平仓合约 2026 年 5 月 13 日
summary: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Matt Miller and Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." Get a jump start on the US trading day with Matt Miller and Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." President Trump lands in Beijing to meet Xi Jinping with Elon Musk, Tim Cook and Jensen Huang in tow. US producer prices rise the most since 2022, driven by war-fueled energy costs. Pilot CEO Adam Wright discusses plans to expand the company’s EV charging footprint amid the energy shock. MARA CEO Fred Thiel on the company’s big pivot from bitcoin mining to AI infrastructure. Brookfield’s Ben Brown says real estate is in recovery mode, with offices making a comeback. Plus, JPMorgan taps a trio of executives to lead its investment bankers globally. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Samanth Subramanian on the Undersea Cables That Keep the Internet Alive | Odd Lots
title_cn: Samanth Subramanian 谈维持互联网活力的海底电缆 |零股
summary: Underneath the world's oceans, miles and miles of fiber optic-cables send packets of information from one location to the next, serving as the backbone of the internet as we know it. This infrastructure is delicate, too: Memorably, a 2022 volcanic eruption cut off the island of Tonga from web access for an extended period of time. Samanth Subramanian is the author of The Web Beneath the Waves: The Fragile Cables that Connect Our World, a recent book that explains, in detail, that the Internet is, and has never been, truly weightless or wireless. In fact, the system in place right now is pretty old school and resembles the telegraph cable network of yore. We talk to Subramanian about the strange contradictions of the undersea cable system, how much basic marine geography — like the Strait of Hormuz or the Suez Canal — informs where cables are laid, and how hard it is protect this vulnerable and vital infrastructure. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Microsoft Spent Over $100 Billion on OpenAI Partnership
title_cn: 微软斥资超过 1000 亿美元与 OpenAI 合作
summary: Microsoft Corp. has spent more than $100 billion on its partnership with OpenAI, a sum that underscores the significance of the software maker’s role in the AI company’s growth.

title: Anduril Doubles Valuation to $61 Billion With Latest Funding
title_cn: Anduril 凭借最新融资，估值翻倍至 610 亿美元
summary: Anduril Industries Inc. doubled its valuation to $61 billion in a fresh $5 billion funding round led by Thrive Capital and Andreessen Horowitz, a sign of soaring interest in the defense technology company.

title: Honeywell CEO Discusses Company's Dealmaking, Spinoffs
title_cn: 霍尼韦尔首席执行官讨论公司的交易和分拆
summary:
Global events like the Iran conflict and the rise of artificial intelligence are creating increased demand for Honeywell International Inc. products ahead of its split later this month, according to the companies chief executive officer Vimal Kapur. He speaks with Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals."
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anduril CEO Weighs on $61 Billion Round
title_cn: Anduril 首席执行官考虑 610 亿美元融资
summary: Anduril is being valued at $61 billion in a $5 billion funding round led by Thrive Capital and Andreessen Horowitz to invest “aggressively” in manufacturing capacity, research and development and infrastructure. Anduril CEO Brian Schimpf joins Ed Ludlow and Caroline Hyde to discuss on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: MARA Strikes Data Center Deals in AI Pivot
title_cn: MARA 在 AI Pivot 领域达成数据中心交易
summary: MARA continues to shift its focus from Bitcoin mining to the unprecedented energy demand needed to fuel AI. MARA CEO Fred Thiel discusses the company’s big pivot on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Arm, SoftBank Said to Have Tried to Buy Cerebras
title_cn: Arm、软银据说曾试图收购 Cerebras
summary: Arm Holdings and SoftBank Group made an approach to acquire Cerebras Systems weeks before its expected initial public offering, which was rebuffed. Bailey Lipschultz has more on "Bloomberg Deals." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fed Survey Shows More Job Anxiety, Widespread Price Concerns
title_cn: 美联储调查显示更多的就业焦虑和普遍的价格担忧
summary: The vast majority of Americans worried about high prices in 2025, and a growing share grew anxious about the job market too, according to an annual Federal Reserve survey.

title: Arm, SoftBank Tried to Buy Cerebras in 11th Hour
title_cn: Arm、软银试图在第 11 个小时内收购 Cerebras
summary: Arm Holdings Plc and majority owner SoftBank Group Corp. made an approach to acquire Cerebras Systems Inc., the AI computing firm, weeks before its expected initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: AI Startup Fractile Raises $220 Million for Chip Production
title_cn: AI 初创公司 Fractile 融资 2.2 亿美元用于芯片生产
summary: Fractile, a UK startup designing chips to handle artificial intelligence workloads, has raised $220 million to help produce its first processors.

title: Mistral Developing New AI Model for Banks Lacking Mythos Access
title_cn: Mistral 为缺乏神话访问权限的银行开发新的人工智能模型
summary: French artificial intelligence startup Mistral AI is in discussions with European banks about deploying its answer to Anthropic PBC’s Mythos, the limited-access AI model that can uncover cybersecurity vulnerabilities at unprecedented speed and scale.

title: Iran Threat 'Still There:' Sen. Blumenthal
title_cn: 布卢门撒尔参议员：伊朗威胁“依然存在”
summary: Senator Richard Blumenthal (D-CT), a member of the Senate Armed Services Committee, says a New York Times report that Iran has regained access to most of its missile sites and launchers is "certainly no surprise" and is consistent with what he has heard from reliable sources. He says evidence shows Iran's Revolutionary Guard, hard-core leadership, and enriched uranium remain in place, leaving President Trump in a "real dilemma" over the Strait of Hormuz. Blumenthal also reiterates support for suspending the federal gas tax and calls for passage of the Kids Online Safety Act. He speaks with Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power" from Capitol Hill. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: All About Jho Low, the Alleged Mastermind of the 1MDB Scandal
title_cn: 关于刘特佐 (Jho Low) 的一切，他被指是 1MDB 丑闻的策划者
summary: US prosecutors call him the mastermind of one of the largest frauds in history. He’s avoided arrest since disappearing from public view in 2015. Now, from wherever he’s hiding, the fugitive Malaysian financier Jho Low is seeking a pardon from President Donald Trump.

title: UAE Denies Netanyahu Made Secret Visit During Iran Conflict
title_cn: 阿联酋否认内塔尼亚胡在伊朗冲突期间进行秘密访问
summary: The United Arab Emirates denied that Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu had visited the Gulf country, shortly after Israel said he made a “secret visit” to the UAE.

title: Canada Court Quashes Alberta Separatists’ Bid for Referendum
title_cn: 加拿大法院驳回艾伯塔省分离主义者的公投申请
summary: A court in Alberta ruled that political activists can’t proceed with a petition to force a vote on separation from Canada because the government failed to meet its obligation to consult with Indigenous peoples.

title: Air Force Affirms $400 Million Cost Estimate for Jet from Qatar
title_cn: 空军确认卡塔尔喷气式飞机的成本估计为 4 亿美元
summary: A top Air Force official affirmed that an aircraft Qatar gave to the US as an interim presidential jet will cost about $400 million to retrofit.

title: US-China Tension Over AI Loom Over Trump’s Summit With XI
title_cn: 特朗普与习近平的峰会上美中围绕人工智能的紧​​张局势迫在眉睫
summary: The two nations are in a tug of war for dominance in the technology.

title: US Waives Visa Bonds for Some World Cup Ticket Holders
title_cn: 美国免除部分世界杯门票持有者的签证保证金
summary: The Trump administration is suspending a requirement for visitors from certain countries to post bonds of as much as $15,000 to obtain a visa, an effort aimed at easing the financial burden for foreign soccer fans attending the World Cup.

title: Trump Lands in China for Xi Summit | Balance of Power: Early Edition 5/13/2026
title_cn: 特朗普抵达中国出席习近平峰会 |权力平衡：早期版本 2026 年 5 月 13 日
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss President Donald Trump's trip to China. On today's show, former State Department Chief Economist Chad Bown, Maywood Strategies Principal Douglas Farrar, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis, Democratic Congresswoman Suzan DelBene and American Action Forum President Douglas Holtz-Eakin. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Massie’s Reelection Is a National Test
title_cn: 马西的连任是一次全国性的考验
summary: Republican Representative Thomas Massie broke with President Trump over the Epstein Files and now faces reelection. Bloomberg Opinion columnist Mary Ellen Klas went to Kentucky to speak to his constituents. She says Massie’s reelection is a national test for the GOP. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Italian Leads Race to Become Top Envoy to Bosnia-Herzegovina
title_cn: 意大利在成为波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那高级特使的竞争中处于领先地位
summary: A veteran Italian diplomat has emerged as the frontrunner to succeed Christian Schmidt as the top international envoy to Bosnia-Herzegovina.

title: Warsh Confirmed by Senate to Lead Federal Reserve
title_cn: 参议院确认沃什领导美联储
summary: The Senate confirmed Kevin Warsh as chair of the Federal Reserve with a 54-45 vote, the slimmest confirmation margin ever for a head of the central bank. Mike McKee reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Senate Confirms Warsh to Lead Fed as Trump Tests Its Autonomy
title_cn: 特朗普测试美联储自主权，参议院确认沃什领导美联储
summary:
The Senate narrowly confirmed Kevin Warsh chair of the Federal Reserve, setting up the most controversial leadership transition at the US central bank in decades and a test of its political independence. 
The 54-45 vote Wednesday was the slimmest confirmation margin ever for a head of the central bank, reflecting polarized politics in Congress and Democratic fears that Warsh will bend to President Donald Trump’s demands to rapidly lower interest rates.Bloomberg's Mike McKee joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to break down the confirmation. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Senate Confirms Kevin Warsh to Lead Fed in Narrowest-Ever Vote
title_cn: 参议院确认凯文·沃什（Kevin Warsh）以史上最窄投票率领导美联储
summary: The Senate narrowly confirmed Kevin Warsh as chair of the Federal Reserve, setting up the most controversial leadership transition at the US central bank in decades and a test of its political independence.

title: Fed’s Warsh To Face the Highest Inflation in Three Years
title_cn: 美联储沃什将面临三年来最高通胀
summary: Douglas Holtz-Eakin, President of the American Action Forum and former Director of the Congressional Budget Office joins Balance of Power to discuss the recent inflation data and how this will effect the Fed's rate decisions. Warsh arrives just in time for two-year Treasury yields to touch 4%, their highest since June last year, buoyed by the strong market expectation that the fed funds rate cannot move far from where it is now — but that the next move is now more likely to be a hike than a cut:  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Lands in China With Iran War in Limbo
title_cn: 伊朗战争悬而未决 特朗普登陆中国
summary:
Kelly Grieco, Senior Fellow with the Reimagining US Grand Strategy Program at the Stimson Center joins Balance of Power to discuss the recent news reported that Iran may still have intact missile capabilities. Iran's missile capabilities brings more light to the Trump, Xi Summit as the conflict continues between the US and Iran.  President Donald Trump arrived in Beijing for the first state visit to China by a US leader in nine years, as the world’s two largest economies look to stabilize ties with a summit playing out against the backdrop of the Iran war.
Air Force One touched down at the Beijing Capital International Airport slightly before 8 p.m. on Wednesday, where Chinese Vice President Han Zheng, a military honor guard, and hundreds of flag-waving children readied a red-carpet greeting ceremony for the US president. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Redistricting Wars In Focus As Midterms Loom
title_cn: 中期选举临近，重新划分选区战争成为焦点
summary:
Representative Suzan DelBene, said Republicans won't get what they expected from redistricting because of voter anger with President Trump and Republicans in Congress. House Democrats may have lost the mid-decade redistricting battle. They still have the edge in the campaign for control of the chamber at the midpoint of President Donald Trump’s second term.
The US Supreme Court sharply limiting race-based redistricting and the Virginia Supreme Court voiding a Democratic gerrymander have made that task harder, but Democrats have history and political winds on their side. They control 215 House seats, three short of a majority, and the out-of-power party has gained House seats in 18 of 20 midterm elections since the end of World War II. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Putin Replaces Heads of Two Border Regions Targeted by Ukraine
title_cn: 普京撤换乌克兰针对的两个边境地区领导人
summary: Russian President Vladimir Putin replaced the heads of two regions bordering on Ukraine that have been repeatedly targeted by Kyiv’s forces since the war began more than four years ago.

title: Who Is Starmer Challenger Wes Streeting?
title_cn: 斯塔默挑战者韦斯·斯特里汀是谁？
summary: Who is Wes Streeting, the cabinet minister expected to resign and challenge Keir Starmer? Alex Morgan explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gaza Envoy Says Plan Underway to Advance Peace, Disarm Hamas
title_cn: 加沙特使称推进和平、解除哈马斯武装的计划正在进行中
summary: US President Donald Trump’s Board of Peace for Gaza is preparing a 15-point plan for the disarmament of Hamas, a key obstruction to reconstruction and rehabilitation efforts in the war-ravaged territory.

title: Leftist Sánchez to Take On Fujimori in Peru’s Presidential Runoff
title_cn: 左翼桑切斯将在秘鲁总统决选中挑战藤森
summary: Left-wing lawmaker Roberto Sánchez has enough votes to squeak by another contender and advance to Peru’s presidential runoff against conservative Keiko Fujimori, according to totals published by the elections regulator after weeks of adjudicating disputed ballots.

title: Senators Advance Resolution to Block Their Pay During Shutdowns
title_cn: 参议员提出决议，在停摆期间阻止他们的工资
summary: Senators would forgo their pay during future government shutdowns under a measure that just cleared a key initial procedural hurdle on the floor Wednesday.

title: Private Credit, Retail Fraud Top SEC’s Enforcement Priority List
title_cn: 私人信贷、零售欺诈位列 SEC 执法优先名单之首
summary: The new head of the US Securities and Exchange Commission’s enforcement division is keeping an eye on stress in the private credit market and retail investor fraud, signaling the top cop’s priorities a week into the job.

title: EU Seeks to Shield Farmers From War-Induced Fertilizer Shock
title_cn: 欧盟寻求保护农民免受战争引发的化肥冲击
summary: The European Union is considering stockpiling fertilizers and providing relief for farmers as part of measures aimed at tackling soaring costs caused by the Middle East conflict.

title: Ukraine Comes Under Major Russian Drone Strikes Near NATO Border
title_cn: 乌克兰在北约边境附近遭受俄罗斯无人机大规模袭击
summary: Ukraine came under “one of the longest” Russian attacks with drone barrages targeting regions close to the border with NATO members in the western and southwestern part of the country, according to President Volodymyr Zelenskiy.

title: Marcos Calls for Calm as Shots Ring Out at Philippine Senate
title_cn: 菲律宾参议院枪声响起 马科斯呼吁保持冷静
summary: Gunshots were fired at the Philippine Senate on Wednesday evening where a lawmaker wanted by the International Criminal Court has sought refuge. President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. called for calm and denied any government involvement in the incident.

title: At China Summit, Trump Has CEOs, But Xi Has Leverage
title_cn: 在中国峰会上，特朗普有首席执行官，但习近平有影响力
summary: The Iran war pulls US attention away from the key agenda of trade, tech and Taiwan.
